name: Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Pour in the egg and milk mixture, stirring until well combined.
3. Add the melted butter and stir again.
4. Grease a pan and pour the batter in it.
5. Bake at 350°F to 400°F (moderate temperature) until the edges are just browned.
6. Corn bread is delicious baked in a cast iron skillet!
